calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce And Compel Compliance Wioth Subpoenas Issued In Action Pending Outside Against Witnesses Andf Request For Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Mandy D. Hexom, Esq. of Buchanan Ingersoll & Rooney LLP, Tel. 619.685.1990, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Elizabeth L. Deeley, Esq. of Kirkland & Ellis LLP, Tel. 415.439.1861, appearing for non party FTB.

After hearing, PETITIONER FRANK ANGRISANI'S Motion To Enforce And Compel Compliance Wioth Subpoenas Issued In Action Pending Outside Against Witnesses And Request For Sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Katherine Huibonhoa, Reporter: Sheila Arceno, CSR # 13293 (Tel. 866.299.5127)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce And Compel Compliance Wioth Subpoenas Issued In Action Pending Outside Against Witnesses Andf Request For Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Continued To Apr-03-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER FRANK ANGRISANI'S Motion To Enforce And Compel Compliance With Subpoenas Issued In Action Pending Outside Against Witnesses And Request For Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 3, 2012. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Not reported =302/HK
